title: HAKACC Sea Shell Set, 50-70 PCS Assorted Natural Shells for Crafting Vase Fillers Party Home Seaside Decorations
features: Perfect ornaments: these natural seashells was carefully handpicked and cleaned.
Size: The bag includes 50-70PCS colorful Seashells and range in size up to 1-5cm.
Decoration: String them to make jewelry or affix these mini conchs to surfaces for craft borders，natural sea shells add a fresh touch to nautical or beach decor.

Use for : bathroom, potpourri accent, vase filler, garden accent, aquarium decor and many more DIY!They make perfect accents for candle making, filling clear vases, nautical decor, ornaments, floral and wreath arrangements and beach party decorations.
Occation: Great for beach-style decorating for home or partys.Just fill a glass bowl with this assortment to give an instant beach feel to your living room.
description: Product Description Our brand, HAKACC, focuses on high-quality household products. We aim to provide you with fashionable, high-grade and cost-efficient household products. We stand for concepts featuring environmental protection, health, versatility and good quality. Our products are suitable for decoration, reception, holiday parties and any other occasions in your daily life. Choose our products to make your life wonderful. We sincerely hope you will enjoy our products and service. You can string up these shells to make them as a necklace or bracelet. Also can stick on the photo frame as a decoration for your home. All of our shells are hand-picked by professional artisans, can add a pop of rustic and seaside accent to your house. Our sea shells are suitable for house decorations, seaside party, summer party, swimming pool party, home improvement, or a gift for your friends, family and coworks.
